title: Cazenga Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Cazenga with a Z-Score of +3.14. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Cazenga is causing extremely high temperatures, with a score of 10.0 out of 10. 
 The high temperature is also accompanied by high humidity, at 68%, and moderate wind speed, at 13.9 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Cazenga.
